rows.label: bf02380100_0010
rows.name: He's using his Blade as a shield...

rows.label: bf02380100_0020
rows.name:
What? Does common sense elude you? A
Blade can regenerate from any injury!

rows.label: bf02380100_0030
rows.name:
But if the Driver dies, the Blade
returns to its original Core.

rows.label: bf02380100_0040
rows.name:
So it's okay to use them
as a living shield?

rows.label: bf02380100_0050
rows.name:
Even if they can regenerate flesh wounds, the
wounds to the heart don't go away easily.

rows.label: bf02380100_0060
rows.name:
'I understand how Blades feel'...
Is that what you're saying?

rows.label: bf02380100_0070
rows.name: Heh, so there are gentle Drivers too.
